files.name: welcome.txt
lines: I'm Haleemah Malik. A computer science student from Pakistan.
I like creating problems for solutions:
breaking things, fixing things, and learning why they broke.
This little corner is a collection of things I've built, learned,

files.name: education.txt
lines: The only thing that interferes with my learning,
Some people change schools. I apparently just changed buildings.
Spent my entire academic journey in H-11 —
from EMS High School, to Punjab College Hill House,

files.name: skills.txt
lines: SKILLS: googling efficiently and pretending it was planned.
HTML · CSS · VS Code · Visual Studio · Canva
• Installing and uninstalling Windows (7+ successful attempts)
• Losing files and learning from the emotional damage
Novel writing (happen to be one of Pakistan's youngest novelists :p)

files.name: tumble-pop.cpp
lines: A C++ recreation of the classic TumblePop arcade game built from scratch.
• File handling for persistent high scores

files.name: metal-slug.cpp
lines: Retro-inspired side-scrolling shooter built entirely in C++.
• Procedural terrain generation using Perlin Noise
Stack: C++ · OOP · Git · GitHub · Visual Studio

files.name: aakhri-mor.cpp
lines: "The Last Turn" — an original game inspired by the streets of Pakistan.
• Custom-designed sprites styled around Pakistani culture
• Handcrafted environments featuring truck art, rickshaws & dhabas
• Original gameplay inspired by local stories and everyday life
• Built with modular C++ systems using vectors and OOP principles
• Version-controlled with Git & GitHub throughout development
Stack: C++ · OOP · STL Vectors · Git · GitHub · VS Code
"Probably the most Pakistani thing I've ever compiled."

files.name: text-editor.cpp
lines: A feature-rich text editor built from scratch in C++.
Stack: C++ · OOP · STL · File Handling

files.name: golden-era.ms
lines: THE GOLDEN ERA OF MUSLIMS — SCRIPT
A courtroom drama I wrote for Talent Show 2022, putting Newton,
Descartes, and a Zionist propagandist on trial for stealing credit
from Muslim scientists of the golden era.
"Perhaps Newton's ideas did not fall from an apple tree, instead
they fell from the great minds of Muslim scientists before them."

files.name: jinnahs-pakistan.md
lines: Jinnah's Pakistan: Islamic State or Secular Nation?
History is rarely black and white.
This article examines Jinnah's vision through speeches,
historical context, and constitutional debates, asking whether
Pakistan was imagined as an Islamic state, a secular nation,

files.name: the-sky-we-own.txt
lines: Tagline: "When they fight, even death surrenders."
A novel about the illegal occupation of Kashmir — told through
fiction because sometimes the truth needs a story to breathe.
This isn't a light read. It's the kind of book that sits with you
after you close it. I wrote every page like it mattered, because it does.

files.name: contact.txt
lines: Want to talk books, games, code, or Kashmir?
Want to commission something or just say hi?
Slide into my inbox. I actually reply.
(Unless you're a bot. Bots get ignored. Humans get tea.)
